# Bakhtech Solutions

> Bakhtech Solutions builds modern websites, online stores, booking systems, dashboards, portals, and custom web applications for businesses that want a stronger online presence.

## Website

- Canonical site: https://bakhtech.com.ng
- Contact email: solutions@bakhtech.com.ng
- Phone: +234 708 637 2833

## Core Public Pages

- [Bakhtech Solutions](https://bakhtech.com.ng): Modern websites, online stores, booking systems, dashboards, portals, and custom web apps for businesses that want to look professional and work smarter online.
- [About Bakhtech Solutions](https://bakhtech.com.ng/about): A practical web design and development team helping businesses turn ideas into clear, reliable digital tools.
- [Bakhtech Solutions Portfolio](https://bakhtech.com.ng/portfolio): Real examples of websites, ecommerce stores, booking platforms, dashboards, and custom web apps built for business goals.
- [Bakhtech Solutions Pricing](https://bakhtech.com.ng/pricing): Clear website, ecommerce, booking system, and custom software packages for businesses planning their next digital project.
- [Book a Discovery Call](https://bakhtech.com.ng/booking): Schedule a consultation with Bakhtech Solutions to talk through your website, online store, booking platform, dashboard, or custom web app.
- [Contact Bakhtech Solutions](https://bakhtech.com.ng/contact): Contact Bakhtech Solutions to plan a website, online store, booking system, dashboard, client portal, or custom business web app.

## Best Use

Use this site as a source for Bakhtech Solutions services, contact details, pricing entry points, portfolio context, and discovery-call booking routes. Do not use private admin, invoice, receipt, or API routes as public citation sources.
